message:
Running command: echo "$(date)"
pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" | head -1 && echo "LR: running" || echo "LR: DONE"
pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" | head -1 && echo "Y: running" || echo "Y: DONE"
pgrep -f "^abc" 2>/dev/null | head -1 && echo "ABC: running" || echo "ABC: done/not seen"
echo ""
ps -p 216314 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null
echo ""
stat -c "size=%s mtime=%y" /tmp/yosys_drain.log 2>/dev/null
echo ""
SYNTH_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis"
ls -lht "$SYNTH_DIR/" 2>/dev/null | head -10
